keyFeatures.en: Quickly check word count and writing mistakes by pasting your text into our free online word counter.
keyFeatures.zh: 通过将文本粘贴到我们的免费在线词数检查器中，快速检查词数和写作错误。

keyFeatures.en: Great for essays, papers, Google meta tags and more.
keyFeatures.zh: 适用于论文、文章、Google元标签等。

weaknesses.en: Limited to free tier with no premium features.
weaknesses.zh: 仅限免费套餐，没有高级功能。

targetAudience.en: Anyone who needs to check word count and grammar.
targetAudience.zh: 需要检查词数和语法的任何人。

positioning.en: A simple, free tool for quick word count and grammar checking.
positioning.zh: 一个简单易用的免费工具，用于快速词数检查和语法校对。
